overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage beginning with a ground-level exploration of a golden phoenix statue in a neon-lit plaza, then transitioning to driving through Night City highways. The clip features futuristic architecture, flying vehicles, and a mix of artificial neon and natural moonlight against a hazy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with monumental golden statue

agents.ego_description: circling slowly around the golden phoenix statue to view it from all angles

entered.detail: large illuminated golden bird sculpture with spread wings on a pedestal
tall palm trees surrounding the plaza area
tall corporate building with green 'softsys' neon signage
bright full moon visible in the night sky above the city
various illuminated advertisements and corporate signage on buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera circles a magnificent golden phoenix statue in an open urban plaza at night. Palm trees frame the scene while the Night City skyline with neon corporate signage rises in the background under a full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from plaza to highway with hillside landmark

events.description: moving away from the statue plaza toward the highway edge
transition from walking to entering a vehicle and beginning to drive

agents.ego_description: leaving the statue plaza and entering a vehicle to drive onto the highway

entered.detail: large illuminated 'NC' letters on the hillside resembling the Hollywood sign
multi-lane asphalt road with lane markings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the statue toward a highway, revealing the iconic NC sign on the hillside. The golden phoenix statue recedes to the right as the camera approaches the road and transitions into a vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane cyberpunk city highway with dense neon signage

events.description: flying AV vehicle passes overhead above the highway
passing multiple vehicles on the highway while driving through downtown

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed through Night City highways passing neon-lit corporate buildings and other traffic

notable_agents.action: flying AV vehicle hovering and moving above the highway traffic
cars passing by and being overtaken on the left

entered.detail: futuristic aerial vehicle with lights flying above the road
tall modern street lamps illuminating the highway
various futuristic cars driving on the multi-lane road
tall skyscrapers covered in bright neon advertisements and windows

segments.scene_description: Driving through the heart of Night City on a multi-lane highway surrounded by towering neon-lit buildings. A flying AV vehicle passes overhead while the camera navigates through moderate traffic, with the Softsys building visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exiting downtown with distant city views

events.description: driving away from dense downtown into less developed outskirts

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive on the highway as the dense city gives way to open road and distant skyline views

notable_agents.action: flying AV vehicle hovering stationary in the distance ahead

entered.detail: Night City skyline visible in the distance with illuminated towers
dark hills framing the highway on the left side

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up as the camera drives away from the dense downtown core. The city skyline becomes a distant glowing horizon while a flying AV vehicle hovers ahead. The surroundings become darker and more natural with hills and grass visible alongside the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a focused exploration of a golden monument and expands into a high-speed journey away from a neon metropolis. It begins by circling a magnificent golden phoenix statue in an open urban plaza, framed by palm trees and a moonlit skyline of corporate signage. As the camera moves away from the statue, the scene shifts toward a highway where the iconic NC sign appears on a hillside before the perspective transitions into a vehicle. The camera then accelerates through the heart of Night City on a multi-lane highway, weaving through traffic beneath towering neon buildings and passing flying AV vehicles. Finally, the dense downtown core recedes into a distant glowing horizon as the road opens up, transitioning from the artificial city lights toward darker, natural hills and grassy landscapes.
